mapper.sql: fur.user_id, fur.role_id, fur.create_time, fur.create_by, fur.update_time, fur.update_by

${tAlias}.user_id as ${tAlias}_user_id, ${tAlias}.role_id as ${tAlias}_role_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_users_roles (user_id, role_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from fnd_users_roles fur where fur.user_id = (select top 1 fu.id from fnd_user fu join swm_employee se on fu.employee_id = se.employee_id and se.work_flag = 1 where se.id = #{seId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) and fur.role_id = (select fr.id from fnd_role fr where fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR})) then 1 else 0 end

select case when exists (select 1 from fnd_users_roles fur where fur.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and fur.role_id = (select fr.id from fnd_role fr where fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR})) then 1 else 0 end
